PDF to Image Converter v1.1
===========================
Built by Nate Rudquist

WHAT IT DOES
------------
- Convert PDF files to images (PNG or JPEG)
- Scan web pages for PDF links and download them in bulk

HOW TO USE
----------
1. Double-click "PDF to Image.exe" to launch the app.
2. Use the Convert tab to drag & drop PDF files and convert them to images.
3. Use the Download tab to paste a URL and download PDFs found on that page.

WINDOWS SMARTSCREEN WARNING
----------------------------
If Windows blocks the app, click "More info" then "Run anyway."
The app is safe -- SmartScreen flags apps from new publishers.

SUPPORT
-------
Find this useful? Buy me a coffee: https://ko-fi.com/naterudquist
